# sevalla_application_deployment_hook (Resource)

Manages a deployment hook (webhook) for a Sevalla application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "sevalla_application_deployment_hook" "example" {
  application_id = sevalla_application.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `application_id` (String) The ID of the application. Acts as the resource identifier.

### Read-Only

- `url` (String, Sensitive) The deployment hook URL.
